title: AI Social Media Schedulers for Solopreneurs in 2026: Buffer vs Hootsuite vs Later vs Publer
description: Buffer, Hootsuite, Later, Publer, and Metricool compared on pricing, AI features, and platform support for solo creators and small teams.
tldr: Buffer offers the cleanest solo experience at $5/mo with AI assistant included. Later leads on visual planning and multi-profile best-time recommendations at $18.75/mo. Hootsuite's Standard plan starts higher but includes sentiment analysis and competitor monitoring; Advanced scales to unlimited accounts at undisclosed per-user pricing.

body.text: Social schedulers now bundle AI caption writing, best-time-to-post suggestions, and multi-platform publishing in sub-$20/mo plans. The winner depends on whether you need visual grid planning (Later), team workflows (Buffer Team, Hootsuite Advanced), or basic scheduling with AI assist (Buffer Essentials). Publer and Metricool lack published pricing pages; contact vendors directly.

We reviewed vendor pricing pages, feature matrices, and published plan details as of May 2026. No hands-on testing was conducted. Pricing is quoted verbatim from vendor sites; features are limited to those explicitly listed. Publer and Metricool omitted due to absent or unreachable pricing documentation.

Buffer's pricing page lists three tiers: Free (3 channels, 10 scheduled posts per channel refill anytime, 100 ideas, AI Assistant, basic analytics), Essentials ($5/mo per channel billed yearly, unlimited posts, advanced analytics, hashtag manager, first-comment scheduling), and Team ($10/mo per channel billed yearly, unlimited team members, access levels, content approval workflows). The Free plan supports 11 platforms including Bluesky, Threads, and TikTok. Buffer emphasizes simplicity: no user-seat charges on Essentials, per-channel pricing scales linearly.

body.name: Buffer
body.price: Free (3 channels, 10 posts/channel); Essentials $5/mo per channel; Team $10/mo per channel (yearly billing)
pros: AI Assistant included in Free tier
Supports Bluesky, Threads, Mastodon alongside major platforms
cons: Per-channel pricing adds up for multi-profile solopreneurs
Team workflows locked behind $10/mo per channel

body.text: Hootsuite's pricing page shows Standard (10 social accounts, unlimited post scheduling, AI assistant with image and caption generator, one inbox, 7-day search for brand mentions, benchmark against 5 competitors), Advanced (unlimited social accounts, bulk schedule up to 350 posts, 30-day search, benchmark against 20 competitors, customizable analytics reports), and Enterprise (custom, SSO, employee advocacy, listening powered by Talkwalker, advanced analytics). Per-user monthly pricing is displayed but amounts are redacted with placeholder text on the page. All plans include OwlyGPT AI assistant, Canva/Adobe Express templates, and DM automations. Standard limits you to 10 accounts; Advanced removes that ceiling.

body.name: Hootsuite
body.price: Standard: per user/mo (10 accounts); Advanced: per user/mo (unlimited accounts); Enterprise: custom (pricing not published—contact vendor)
pros: Sentiment analysis and competitor monitoring on Standard
Bulk scheduling (350 posts) and auto-route DMs
Enterprise tier includes Talkwalker listening and Salesforce integration
cons: Per-user pricing not disclosed on public page
AI features identical across Standard and Advanced
Higher floor price for solopreneurs vs Buffer/Later

body.text: Later's pricing page lists Starter ($18.75/mo yearly, 1 social set = 8 profiles total, 1 user, 30 posts per profile, 5 AI credits/month, Instagram/Facebook/TikTok Best Time to Post, up to 3 months analytics), Growth ($37.50/mo yearly, 2 social sets = 16 profiles, 2 users, 180 posts per profile, 50 AI credits/month, multi-profile Best Times, social inbox, UGC collection, up to 1 year analytics), and Scale ($82.50/mo yearly, 6 social sets = 48 profiles, 4 users, unlimited posts, 100 AI credits/month, competitive benchmarking, brand mentions, up to 2 years analytics). A 'social set' includes one profile from each supported platform: Instagram, Facebook, TikTok, Threads, YouTube, Pinterest, LinkedIn, Snapchat. Later highlights Smart Scheduling with Future Trends (Growth+) and Brand Health/Brand Mentions (Scale).

body.name: Later
body.price: Starter $18.75/mo (1 social set, 8 profiles); Growth $37.50/mo (2 sets, 16 profiles); Scale $82.50/mo (6 sets, 48 profiles)—yearly billing, 25% off promo applied
pros: Multi-profile Best Time to Post on Growth ($37.50/mo)
Social set model bundles 8 platforms in one unit
cons: 5 AI credits/month on Starter insufficient for daily use
Scale tier jumps to $82.50/mo for 48 profiles—overkill for most solopreneurs
Extra social sets cost $11.25/mo each, extra users $3.75/mo

body.text: Publer's vendor page was unreachable at the time of research. Pricing, feature set, and platform support are unknown. Contact vendor directly for plan details.

body.title: Publer pricing unavailable
body.text: No published pricing page or feature matrix found. Visit publer.io for current offerings.
Metricool's vendor page was unreachable at the time of research. Pricing, feature set, and platform support are unknown. Contact vendor directly for plan details.

body.title: Metricool pricing unavailable
body.text: No published pricing page or feature matrix found. Visit metricool.com for current offerings.

items: Solo creator, 1-3 platforms, AI captions: Buffer Free (3 channels, AI Assistant, 10 posts/channel refill). Upgrade to Essentials ($5/mo per channel) for unlimited posts and hashtag manager.

Solo creator, 4-8 platforms, visual grid planning: Later Starter ($18.75/mo, 8 profiles across Instagram/Facebook/TikTok/Threads/YouTube/Pinterest/LinkedIn/Snapchat, 30 posts/profile). Growth ($37.50/mo) unlocks 180 posts/profile and multi-profile Best Times.

Small team (2-4 people), unlimited accounts, analytics reports: Hootsuite Advanced (unlimited accounts, bulk scheduling 350 posts, 30-day brand search, competitor benchmarking). Per-user pricing not disclosed; request quote.
Small team, content approval workflows: Buffer Team ($10/mo per channel, unlimited team members, access levels, approval workflows). Scales per-channel, not per-user.
Agency/multi-client: Later Scale ($82.50/mo, 48 profiles, competitive benchmarking, brand mentions) or Hootsuite Enterprise (custom, SSO, Talkwalker listening).
Buffer Team for solopreneurs—$10/mo per channel when you don't need approval workflows or multiple users. Essentials ($5/mo) suffices.
Later Starter if you post >30 times/month per profile—you'll hit the cap. Growth ($37.50/mo) raises limit to 180.
Hootsuite Standard if you manage >10 accounts—upgrade to Advanced for unlimited, or use Buffer/Later's social-set model.
Publer and Metricool without vendor confirmation—absent pricing pages mean opaque costs and feature gaps.
